---
name: Week 2 Completion Confirmation
about: Template for confirming student Week 2 assignment completion
title: 'Week 2 Assignment Confirmation for @[USERNAME]'
labels: week-2, confirmation
assignees: ''
---

Thank you for working through the Week 2 materials, @[USERNAME].

Your commits appear on GitHub with the username and email you have configured in Git. The work you've completed on the Week 2 assignments is now visible in your repository.

The commit history is available to you here: https://github.com/cven5999-ss25/[REPO-NAME]/commits/main/

You can see the changes you have made locally also as a so-called "diff" here: https://github.com/cven5999-ss25/[REPO-NAME]/commit/[COMMIT-HASH]

Let me know if you have any further questions. If not, you can close this issue now, similar to ticking off an item on a TODO list.

I am looking forward to meeting you in class.

---

**Instructions for use:**
- Replace `[USERNAME]` with the student's GitHub username
- Replace `[REPO-NAME]` with the specific repository name (e.g., `wk-02-username`)
- Replace `[COMMIT-HASH]` with the actual commit hash from their work
